summary: Mutations in KCNT2 are primarily linked to epileptogenic conditions but may also contribute to broader neurodevelopmental impairments due to disrupted neuronal excitability; thus, they are not limited solely to seizure-associated phenotypes. The available data suggest potential involvement beyond pure epilepsy through mechanisms affecting overall neural function.
